title: Maped Pastel Sensoft 16cm Scissors (Assorted Colours)
features: Maped Sensoft scissors in x3 pastel colour designs
Assorted colours - Pastel pink, blue or purple. Can not select colour.
description: Maped Pastel Sensoft 16cm Scissors (Assorted Colours) Maped is a family owned company and has grown to become a world leader in the design and manufacture of school and office supplies. The iconic British stationery brands Helix and Oxford are now part of the Maped family, and their traditional education ranges are complemented by Maped’s range of design-led and innovative products. With a variety of stylish and functional products for adults and kids alike at home or school, Maped continues to reinvent ways to let you express yourself freely! For over 60 years. Maped has been creating innovative, high-quality products and renewing the often-traditional school and office accessories markets with an assortment of ergonomic and eye-catching products tailored to the needs of the consumer. Maped is an expert in providing attractive and functional school, artist, and office products to over 125 countries all over the world!
